files.patch:
@@ -14,11 +14,10 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: '20'
-          cache: 'pnpm'
       - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
         with:
           version: 10
-      - run: pnpm install
+      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
       - run: pnpm run lint
       - run: pnpm run test
       - run: pnpm run build
